series_metadata.series_description: These web pages contain information made available to the public via the Internet as a matter of convenience. Records in this series may include, but are not limited to, general descriptive information about the Chancellor and the Board of Regents, frequently asked questions, practice and procedure, bulletins and sample forms, announcements, directives, annual reports, and meeting schedules. Hard copies of this information are maintained by the Chancellor under separate retention schedules.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: online content information is obsolete, replaced, or superseded
